name: Velvet Pumpkin Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the whipped cream in a large mixing bowl on low speed.
2. Mix for 1/2 minute, scraping the bowl frequently.
3. Increase speed to medium and beat for an additional 4 minutes.
4. Pour batter into a greased square pan (8 x 8 x 2 inches) or round layer pan (9 x 1 1/2 inches).
5. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Serve warm with whipped cream.
